g.text: Rule | Always consume the LONGEST valid token first
Decision | '>' seen → peek next → '=' found → consume both → GREATER_EQUAL
Remaining | '=' at idx=2 stands alone → peek next → '\0' → ASSIGN
Guarantee | No backtracking; at most 1 char lookahead via peek()
Alt wrong | GREATER + EQUAL_EQUAL would need parser-level fixup (C++ >> bug)
